title: Smithing table fix
description: Fixes the Smithing table so that all the pixels are the same size
body: Makes the hammer in the smithing table pixel consistent. -if you didn't know, the hammer in the smithing table is made up of 2x2 pixels (2x2 to make it larger). HOWEVER, there is a line of pixels that are actually 2x3 pixels in size. Now that I have pointed this out you will never be able to look at a smithing tables UI without noticing it. Your welcome. (: [MC-261551](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-261551)
